untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'half-span moving average' and 'price objective' which are not available in the allowed indicator list. Half-span MA is a custom indicator not provided (closest approximation used sma_20). Price objective with 10% error factor cannot be computed without explicit price target value in the signal parameters.
translation_notes: Mapped 'half-span moving average turns up/down' to sma_20 crosses as a reasonable proxy for trend direction reversal. The price objective exit condition was excluded due to lack of explicit target price definition and inability to calculate 10% error bands without that parameter. Signal is context-dependent (long/short based on MA direction). Reversal signals act as exits per the original rule.
